file_name.description: Name of the file to be processed. The location of the file depends on the context
file_name.title: File name

service_point_id.description: Service point to be used for transactions created from this file (Loans-only).
service_point_id.title: Service point ID

statistical_code.description: Statistical code (code) to be used inventory records created from this file (Instances, Holdings, Items). Specify multiple codes using multi_field_delimiter.
statistical_code.title: Statistical code

create_source_records.description: If set to true, the source records will be created in FOLIO. If set to false, the source records will not be created in FOLIO. Only applied for MARC-based transformations.
create_source_records.title: Create source records

data_import_marc.description: If set to true, successfully processed MARC records from this file will be included in the MARC file for data import generated by the parent task for inventory records created from this file. Only applied for MARC-based transformations.
data_import_marc.title: Data import MARC

description: The tenant ID to use when making requests to FOLIO APIs for this task, if different from library configuration
ecsTenantId.title: ECS tenant ID

objectType.description: The type of inventory object to post: Instances, Holdings, Items, or ShadowInstances (for consortium shadow copies)
objectType.title: Object type

files.description: List of files to be processed from the results folder
files.title: List of files

batchSize.description: Number of records to include in each batch (1-1000)
batchSize.title: Batch size

upsert.description: Enable upsert mode to create new records or update existing ones. When enabled, records with matching IDs will be updated instead of causing errors.
upsert.title: Upsert

preserveStatisticalCodes.description: Preserve existing statistical codes during upsert. When enabled, statistical codes from existing records will be retained and merged with new codes.
preserveStatisticalCodes.title: Preserve statistical codes

preserveAdministrativeNotes.description: Preserve existing administrative notes during upsert. When enabled, administrative notes from existing records will be retained and merged with new notes.
preserveAdministrativeNotes.title: Preserve administrative notes

preserveTemporaryLocations.description: Preserve temporary location assignments on items during upsert. Only applicable when object_type is 'Items'.
preserveTemporaryLocations.title: Preserve temporary locations

preserveTemporaryLoanTypes.description: Preserve temporary loan type assignments on items during upsert. Only applicable when object_type is 'Items'.
preserveTemporaryLoanTypes.title: Preserve temporary loan types

preserveItemStatus.description: Preserve item status during upsert. When enabled, the status field from existing records will be retained. Only applicable when object_type is 'Items'.
preserveItemStatus.title: Preserve item status

patchExistingRecords.description: Enable selective field patching during upsert. When enabled, only fields specified in patch_paths will be updated, preserving all other fields.
patchExistingRecords.title: Patch existing records

patchPaths.description: List of field paths to patch during upsert (e.g., ['barcode', 'status']). If empty and patch_existing_records is True, all fields will be patched. Use this to selectively update only specific fields while preserving others.
patchPaths.title: Patch paths

rerunFailedRecords.description: After the main run, reprocess any failed records one at a time. This gives each record a second chance with individual error handling.
rerunFailedRecords.title: Rerun failed records

noProgress.description: Disable progress reporting in the console output.
noProgress.title: No progress
